positive: A whimsical and highly detailed central arrangement of various woodland animals – foxes, raccoons, deer, and bluebirds – forming a harmonious group silhouette. The animals are rendered in clean, bold vector linework and solid color fills, mimicking a vintage scientific illustration style but with a playful, modern twist. The background should be a muted, abstract wash of eucalyptus greens and soft terracottas, allowing the central group to pop. Use strong, contrasting colors like deep indigo and mustard yellow against the natural tones. Focus on symmetry and negative space. Flat graphic design, sticker sheet quality, ideal for all-over apparel print.
